title: The Book of Ruth on Shavuot: Why This Story on This Holiday?
title_zh: 五旬节读《路得记》:为什么在这个节日读这个故事?
title_he: מגילת רות בשבועות: למה קוראים את הסיפור הזה בחג הזה?
description: Five connections between Ruth and Shavuot — conversion, harvest, Torah acceptance, chesed, and the lineage of King David.
author: Torah Light Writer
key_concepts: Na'aseh v'nishma (We will do and we will listen)
cultural_parallels: Twenty-Four Filial Exemplars (二十四孝) - Stories teaching ethics
Ren (仁) - Confucian benevolence similar to chesed
Tian (天) - Heaven and cosmic harmony in agriculture
Xiushen (修身) - Self-cultivation through disciplined study
historical_period: Period of Judges (~1100 BCE, corresponding to early Western Zhou Dynasty 周朝 in China)
